\tzpentry{ID3520}{Quantum Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3520 introduces Quantum Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ H_{\text{env}} = \sum_k \hbar \omega_k E_k^\dagger E_k + H_{\text{env-coupling}}. \]
